name: Dilled Chicken Fricassee
recipeIngredient: 4 Bone-in chicken breast halves, skin removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, mix 1/3 cup flour, 1 tsp salt, and 1/2 tsp paprika. Coat the chicken with the mixture, shaking off excess. Set aside.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large, deep nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken, meaty side down, and cook for 1 1/2 minutes per side or until browned. Remove to plate using slotted spoon.
3. Pour remaining broth into bowl with flour mixture and whisk until smooth.
4. Drain fat from skillet and wipe clean. Return oil if needed. Add broth mixture and 2 tablespoons dill to skillet, stirring to combine. Add chicken meaty side up along with potatoes. Bring to boil over high heat. Reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Arrange asparagus over top. Cover and continue simmering for 15-20 more minutes or until chicken and vegetables are tender.
6. Remove pan from heat. Stir in remaining lemon juice and 2 tablespoons dill.
